prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-JACSACJ-12PC-2X2-SLVR Product Type: FOOD_STORAGE_CONTAINER Brand (from catalog): Universal Hobby Existing Title: 12pc Jewelery and Crafting Small Aluminum Container Jars Description: Keep small parts, crafts, or minerals organized with the Universal Hobby 12pc Aluminum Storage Container Set.

The Universal Hobby 12pc Aluminum Storage Container Set is a great addition to any craft set or hobby station. Featuring 12 aluminum containers with clear glass lids, youll be able to organize all of your small items.

Each case measures 2 in diameter and uses a twist off lid so you can safely secure those small parts. Because the top is constructed of clear glass, youll easily be able to tell your items apart without having to label the containers.

This set makes a great gift for crafters and hobbyists alike. Search Terms: storage containers small object clear top container craft supplies item organizer Features: - Dimensions of Each Case: 2" Diameter, 7/8" Deep - Durable Aluminum Body - Clear Glass Lid - Great Gift Idea for Crafters & Hobbyists === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
